summary: Partial RObj decompilation work was merged in a conservative form: robj.c gained many reconstructed functions and header knowledge, but the build was kept matching by unlinking robj.c and restoring/linking the full robj.s assembly. The PR also added DTK-style assembler macros, expanded robj split sections, adjusted RObj symbol scopes to local, and fixed object.h assert macro usage. Comments indicate the author intended the PR as in-progress RObj work; reviewer/maintainer feedback pushed it toward preserving match safety until the remaining functions and DTK setup could be handled later.
what_changed: Restored/kept the full RObj assembly path in asm/sysdolphin/baselib/robj.s, now with a .file "robj.c" directive and DTK-style symbol structure in the assembly diff.
Removed src/sysdolphin/baselib/robj.c.o from TEXT_O_FILES in obj_files.mk so the build links asm/sysdolphin/baselib/robj.s.o instead of the partial C object.

Added substantial reconstructed RObj C code: HSD_RObjGetGlobalPosition, set_dirup_matrix, resolveCnsDirUp, resolveLimits, HSD_RObjUpdateAll, HSD_RObjResolveRefs/All, HSD_RObjLoadDesc, HSD_RObjRemove/RemoveAll, HSD_RObjAlloc/Free, Rvalue allocation/removal/reference resolution, HSD_RObjSetConstraintObj, and _HSD_RObjForgetMemory.
Left weak or unfinished areas explicitly nonmatching with NOT_IMPLEMENTED, including resolveCnsOrientation and expEvaluate in robj.c.
Expanded robj.c split coverage in config/GALE01/splits.txt for .rodata, .data, .bss, .sdata, and .sdata2 in addition to .text/.sbss.
Changed HSD_RObj_804DE6A0 through HSD_RObj_804DE6CC in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from global to local scope.
Renamed the RObj type mask macro from TYPE_MASK to ROBJ_TYPE_MASK and added REFTYPE_EXP, REFTYPE_LIMIT, and REFTYPE_BYTECODE alongside existing RObj reftypes.

Cleaned up robj.h struct pointer types to use project typedef names such as HSD_Rvalue*, HSD_RvalueList*, HSD_ExpDesc*, HSD_ByteCodeExpDesc*, HSD_IKHintDesc*, and HSD_Joint* instead of underscored incomplete struct names.
Broadened RObj APIs from HSD_JObj-specific parameters to void* where the implementation accepts a generic object plus HSD_ObjUpdateFunc, notably HSD_RObjSetConstraintObj and HSD_RObjUpdateAll.
Fixed object.h iref_INC assert style by replacing a manual __assert call with HSD_ASSERT(158, HSD_OBJ(o)->ref_count_individual != 0).
Added many PowerPC assembler constants and DTK helper macros to src/macros.inc, including SPR names, CR bit names, and .fn/.endfn/.obj/.endobj/.sym/.endsym/.rel.
smart_moves: The final merge avoided regressing matching status by unlinking the incomplete C translation and restoring robj.s, while still preserving the recovered C and headers for future work.
Replacing inline asm/nonmatching bodies with NOT_IMPLEMENTED made unfinished C explicit rather than hiding partial behavior behind fragile inline assembly.
Keeping objdiff evidence in the discussion made the merge decision grounded in measurable match status instead of relying only on source-level intent.
Moving RObj constants in symbols.txt from global to local aligned symbol visibility with the restored assembly/data ownership.
Adding DTK macros to macros.inc supports assembly produced or maintained in a cleaner DTK-compatible style and can be reused by other assembly restoration work.
Using HSD_ASSERT in object.h followed the project macro convention and avoided open-coded assert strings/line handling.
decomp_lessons: For large baselib files with many remaining mismatches, it is acceptable to merge useful C/header progress while continuing to link the original assembly until the whole file can be matched.
If a partial C file cannot yet be linked, remove its object from obj_files.mk rather than letting nonmatching code affect the final DOL.
Split sections must include all data-bearing sections referenced by a file; robj.c needed .rodata, .data, .bss, .sdata, and .sdata2 entries, not just text/sbss.
Use NOT_IMPLEMENTED for known unfinished functions when the linked assembly remains authoritative; this keeps the C roadmap visible without claiming a match.
Header work can still be valuable before a file fully matches: reftype constants, function prototypes, union field usage, and reference-resolution APIs help future matching attempts.
Prefer project-level assert macros such as HSD_ASSERT over manually spelling __assert unless there is evidence the manual form is required for matching.
naming_conventions: Use ROBJ_TYPE_MASK instead of a generic TYPE_MASK for RObj flag masks.
Represent RObj high-bit type classes as REFTYPE_EXP, REFTYPE_JOBJ, REFTYPE_LIMIT, REFTYPE_BYTECODE, and REFTYPE_IKHINT.

Use HSD_RObj*, HSD_Rvalue*, HSD_RvalueList*, HSD_ExpDesc*, HSD_ByteCodeExpDesc*, HSD_IKHintDesc*, and HSD_Joint* typedef-style names in robj.h rather than underscored struct tags when those names exist.
RObj helper predicates introduced/used include RObjHasFlags, RObjHasFlags2, and RObjHasLimitReftype.

RObj public APIs follow the HSD_RObj... and HSD_Rvalue... prefixes; private helpers are lower-case or static names such as set_dirup_matrix, resolveCnsDirUp, resolveLimits, expLoadDesc, and bcexpLoadDesc.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Restore all of robj.s when the C file is not yet ready to replace it.
Unlink robj.c from obj_files.mk while retaining robj.s.o in TEXT_O_FILES to preserve matching output.
Use DTK-style assembler macros in macros.inc: .fn/.endfn for functions, .obj/.endobj for objects, .sym/.endsym for sized untyped symbols, and .rel for relative relocations.
Add .file "robj.c" to robj.s to associate the assembly with the source file name.
Mark unfinished C functions as NOT_IMPLEMENTED rather than using inline asm as a temporary bridge when the assembly file is still linked.
Track local/global symbol scope for file-owned constants; this PR made HSD_RObj_804DE6A0 through HSD_RObj_804DE6CC local.
Use objdiff as the arbiter for whether the PR should link C or assembly; comments specifically referenced an objdiff screenshot before merging.

review_feedback.feedback: Suggested merging only after restoring all robj.s, unlinking robj.c, replacing inline asm with NOT_IMPLEMENTED, fixing object.h macro usage, reverting a nonmatching jobj.h change, and checking objdiff.
Accepted the conservative merge path, explaining the PR was intended to show RObj was being worked on and that remaining matching/DTK setup could be handled later.
No line-level review comments were present in the slice; evidence comes from issue comments and the final diff.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that relink src/sysdolphin/baselib/robj.c.o or finish matching RObj from the DTK setup.
Search for subsequent implementations of resolveCnsOrientation and expEvaluate in robj.c.
Search for later changes to ROBJ_TYPE_MASK or RObj reftype constants to confirm final naming.
Find other PRs that add or use DTK macros .fn/.obj/.rel in src/macros.inc.
Check whether the object.h HSD_ASSERT(158, ...) pattern was reused elsewhere for ref/iref count assertions.
